data.name: Real Girl 3 - Virtual Sex
data.detailed_description:
Real Girl 3: The Ultimate Virtual Reality Experience
Are you ready for the most advanced VR experience of your life? Real Girl 3 takes virtual sex simulation to a whole new level, offering unparalleled realism and interactivity. Dive into the most immersive and realistic virtual world, where every detail has been refined to perfection.

Customizate Everything!
We've developed a powerful customization tool that allows users to create a limitless variety of faces, body shapes, outfits, and colors, giving you infinite possibilities to design your perfect woman! And the best part? This tool is completely free within the game.
CUSTOMIZE:
- Hairstyle
- Skin tone
- Body shape, breast size, glute size, waist size, legs and thighs.
- Adjust all the details of the girl's mouth, nose, eyes, eyebrows, ears, jaw, and cheeks
- Change the colors of eyes, lips, hair, and clothes

Cutting-Edge Technology and Interactions
Real Girl 3 leverages the latest advancements in VR technology to bring you closer to reality than ever before. Interact with 12 distinct, beautifully rendered girls, each with unique personalities, body shapes, and ethnicities. And with our customization tool you may have a infinite number of girls! Experience the thrill of virtual sex in multiple stunning locations, each designed to enhance your sensory experience.

Unmatched Interactivity and Realism
Choose from a vast wardrobe of clothing options and explore over 60 animated sex positions, all brought to life with the most realistic animations and sexual expressions. The advanced VR technology allows you to interact with your virtual partner in incredibly detailed ways, such as moving their hair or breasts using your VR controllers.

*** Works flawlessly with a mouse, making a VR headset optional. However, if you do have a VR headset, the experience is absolutely incredible! ***

Main Features
- CUSTOMIZATION TOOL: CREATE a infinite number of girls.
- 12 PRE CREATED girls: Experience the diversity and realism with each unique character.
- 6 breathtaking scenarios: Explore various settings that heighten the virtual sex experience.
- Over 60 sex animations: Each position includes a POV camera for an immersive view.
- +10 sexy dancing animations and poses: Enhance your experience with seductive dances.
- Realistic facial expressions: Adds to the authenticity of each encounter.
- Sensual clothing and voices: Immerse yourself in the realism of virtual intimacy.
- Comprehensive interactions: Use your Mouse, VR Headset, or controllers to navigate and interact with the girls and the scene.
- Compatibility: Supports All VR Devices. We focused on the use of only one button on you VR Controller, so no mather what controller it is, it will work!
- Mouse/trackpad: Enjoy the game with ease, needing only one hand for all interactions.

Additional Features
Real Girl 3 is not just an adult game; it's a fully interactive virtual world. Enjoy constant updates with new animations, girls, and locations. Experience advanced body interactions, such as moving hair and breasts with your VR controllers, bringing a new level of realism to your virtual sex encounters.

Immerse Yourself in Realism
This game is designed for adults, and the virtual reality experience should be approached responsibly. Prepare to be amazed by the unprecedented level of realism and interactivity. Begin your journey into the most realistic virtual sex world with Real Girl 3.

Stay with us as we continue to enhance your virtual reality experience, making it more realistic and immersive with each update.

* Real Girl 3 is a fully interactive game.
** Real Girl 3 is not just a video or pre rendered images. It is fully interactable.
*** A VR headset is not required, but it significantly enhances the experience.
**** With a VR headset, the experience is truly phenomenal!

Experience the future of virtual intimacy with Real Girl 3!

data.short_description: Real Girl 3 is an interactive virtual sex simulation game. Fully immersive with or without VR, it offers extensive customization options, allowing you to create and personalize countless girls to bring the girl of your dreams to life.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i3-6100/AMD Ryzen 3 1200, FX4350 or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1050 Ti/AMD Radeon RX 470 or greater
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • VR 支援: OpenXR Devices
  • 備註: You DO NOT need a VR Headset to play this game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or greater
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 6700K equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660 / AMD equivalent or greater
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • VR 支援: OpenXR Devices
  • 備註: You DO NOT need a VR Headset to play this game.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel i3-6100/AMD Ryzen 3 1200, FX4350 or greater
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1050 Ti/AMD Radeon RX 470 or greater
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any
  • VR Support: OpenXR Devices
  • Additional Notes: You DO NOT need a VR Headset to play this game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or greater
  • Processor: Intel Core i7 6700K equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660 / AMD equivalent or greater
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any
  • VR Support: OpenXR Devices
  • Additional Notes: You DO NOT need a VR Headset to play this game.
